description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has multiple jobs for different operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macOS-latest) and compilers (g++, clang++, g++-7, g++-8, g++-9, clang-8, clang-9, clang-10). Each job compiles and runs tests using cmake and ctest with various configurations and matrix strategies.
